# fulfill()

**Instance Method**

Marks the expectation as having been met.

## Declaration

```swift
func fulfill()
```

## Discussion

It is an error to call this method on an expectation that has already been fulfilled, or when the test case that vended the expectation has already completed.
title: fulfill()
